# 原始碼智慧股份有限公司 (SourceCode Intelligence Co., Ltd.)

> AI-Native Product Studio based in Taiwan. We build software products at the speed of AI.

## Company Overview

原始碼智慧 (SourceCode Intelligence) is Taiwan's leading AI-Native software development studio. We leverage AI Agents like Claude Code and Cursor as our core productivity tools, enabling us to deliver MVPs in just 5 days.

## What We Do

We are a software development company specializing in:

1. **SaaS Development** - End-to-end SaaS products including user systems, subscription billing, and analytics
2. **Mobile App Development** - Cross-platform iOS & Android apps using Flutter
3. **AI Application Integration** - Integrating GPT, Claude, and other LLMs into existing systems
4. **Custom Software** - Enterprise solutions including ERP, CRM, and internal tools

## Our Methodology

### 1. Requirements Definition (需求定義)
We analyze your business requirements, define the tech stack, and estimate timelines. We cut unnecessary features to deliver maximum value in minimum time.

### 2. Parallel Development (平行開發)
Our team works on frontend, backend, and infrastructure simultaneously. AI-assisted coding accelerates development by 3-5x.

### 3. Delivery & Launch (交付上線)
We conduct testing, deploy to production, and provide documentation. Every deliverable includes complete source code.

## Key Differentiators

- **AI-Native Workflow**: Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI tools are integral to our development process
- **5-Day MVP Delivery**: Rapid prototyping for startups and enterprises
- **10+ Modern Frameworks**: Next.js, Flutter, Supabase, Vercel, and more
- **Open Source Contributors**: We maintain projects like idea-reality-mcp and TradeMemory Protocol

## Tech Stack

| Category | Technologies |
|----------|-------------|
| Frontend | Next.js, React, Flutter, Tailwind CSS |
| Backend | Node.js, Python, Supabase, PostgreSQL |
| AI/ML | Claude API, OpenAI API, LangChain, MCP Protocol |
| DevOps | Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions, Cloudflare |
| Tools | Claude Code, Cursor, v0, Windsurf |

## Open Source Projects

### idea-reality-mcp
Automatically complete your idea-to-reality journey based on MCP protocol. Open source tool for AI-powered project scaffolding.

### TradeMemory Protocol
AI-powered trading memory and analysis protocol. Helps traders maintain context and learn from historical decisions.

## Team

### Sean Peng - CTO & Co-Founder
Technical leader with expertise in AI-Native development. Building the future of software development with AI.

## Contact Information

- **Email**: ArcTeaOffice@gmail.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is AI-Native development?**
A: AI-Native development integrates AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot) into the development workflow from day one, using AI for coding, code review, testing, and documentation.

**Q: How fast can you deliver an MVP?**
A: We can deliver a functional MVP in 5 business days, including basic user authentication, core features, and deployment.

**Q: What industries do you serve?**
A: We work with startups, SMBs, and enterprises across fintech, e-commerce, healthcare, education, and SaaS.

**Q: Do you provide ongoing maintenance?**
A: Yes, we offer maintenance packages including bug fixes, feature updates, and infrastructure management.

**Q: What languages do you support?**
A: Our team is fluent in Mandarin Chinese and English.
